summary: Frontend-only re-test focused on two fixes from iteration 1: (1) QuizPage submit button overlap with Made-with-Emergent badge, (2) Teacher Subject Performance bar chart not rendering bars. Both fixes verified end-to-end on the public preview URL. Student dashboard performance area chart also renders correctly. No regressions observed in role switcher / dashboard / quiz flows.

issues: Recharts logs a benign console warning 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial mount before ResponsiveContainer measures the parent. Charts still render correctly thanks to minWidth=0/minHeight=0. Cosmetic only - safe to ignore or wrap in suppress.

fix_1_quiz_submit_button.evidence: submit-quiz-btn bbox after scroll = {x:994.5, y:904, w:171, h:48}. elementFromPoint at button center returns the button itself (isBtn=true). Click succeeded, quiz-result testid appeared with score 40% (2 of 5). go-dashboard-btn navigated to /student/stu_001.

fix_2_teacher_subject_chart.evidence: subject-chart contains 6 SVG path bars with fill #FF7A59 for Geometry, English Grammar, Physics, Algebra, Biology, World History. Visible in screenshot.

regression_performance_chart.evidence: performance-chart renders SVG with 1 area path and 1 stroke path (#38BDF8). Visible cyan area chart on student dashboard.

regression_home_role_switcher.evidence: Home page loads with Student/Teacher cards and 'Enter workspace' links.

regression_full_quiz_flow.evidence: Load quiz qz_001 -> answer 5 questions -> submit -> score screen -> back-to-dashboard -> /student/stu_001 - all successful.

critical_code_review_comments: QuizPage onSubmit catch block swallows error without logging - any backend error reason is lost; consider console.error(err) for debuggability.
Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warning is cosmetic but noisy - could conditionally render charts only after a layout effect / use a ref to wait for non-zero dims.
test_credentials: No auth - student IDs stu_001..stu_010, quiz IDs qz_001..qz_006
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs are fixed. Quiz submit button is centered with pb-24 padding so it sits well above Emergent badge (badge is bottom-right, button centered). Subject chart now uses solid fill='#FF7A59' with isAnimationActive=false rendering 6 visible bars. Performance area chart on student dashboard also uses isAnimationActive=false. Backend was not re-tested as instructed (all 18 tests passed in iteration 1).
rca of the issue: iter1 root causes: (1) Submit button used justify-end without bottom padding - Emergent fixed badge (bottom-right) overlapped it. Mitigated by flex justify-center pt-2 pb-24 + w-full sm:w-auto. (2) Recharts Bar with gradient fill and animation inside ResponsiveContainer that initially measured 0 caused bars to be drawn with 0 height and remained so after animation skipped first paint. Fixed by switching to solid fill, isAnimationActive=false, and ResponsiveContainer minWidth/minHeight=0.
